findings.description: Bar chart for Flow Regime Changes (Stream Condition Middle Deep River, Node 280) is missing from the HTML. The chart legend categories are rendered as text bullet points, but the actual bar chart image is absent.
findings.evidence: PDF page 15 shows a detailed grouped bar chart with QAA percentage categories across Unimpaired, 2003 Demands, 2030 Demands, and 2050 Demands scenarios. HTML renders only the legend items as bullet points (< 10% of QAA*, 10-20% of QAA, etc.) with no chart image.

findings.description: Venn diagram for Project Organization is missing. The three overlapping circles showing Data Collection/HDR, Model Development/HydroLogics, and Data Model Evaluation & Plan Development/NCDWR are not present as an image.
findings.evidence: PDF page 19 shows a visual Venn diagram with three overlapping circles representing the three project roles. HTML renders the same information only as a bulleted text list with no diagram image.

findings.description: Slide image fragments showing Task 2 and Task 4 headings in purple italic appear interspersed with the HTML text rendition of the same task list content, creating duplicated reading flow.
findings.evidence: HTML shows cropped slide image fragments containing 'Task 2 - OASIS Application Development' and 'Task 4 – Deliverables' inline between the separately rendered text versions of Tasks 1-5, causing each task heading to appear twice.

findings.description: Table 4-3 (Water Supply Demand & Deficits) is rendered both as an embedded image AND as a separate HTML <table>. The same data appears twice in the HTML body, once as the image and once as structured markup.
findings.evidence: HTML contains: immediately followed by a full with the same six data rows (Orange-Alamance, Hillsborough, Piedmont Minerals, Raleigh, Durham, SGWASA). The PDF shows this content only once on page 16.

findings.description: Tasks 2 and 4 on page 20 are rendered both as embedded images (text graphics) AND as duplicate inline <em> text within the same list items.
findings.evidence:
HTML:
  • Task 2 - OASIS Application Development
    • and similarly for Task 4. In the PDF these each appear once as styled text.

findings.description: The literal URL on the final slide (page 23) appears as plain text in the HTML, not wrapped in an <a href> tag.
findings.evidence:
HTML:

https://deq.nc.gov/about/divisions/water-resources/

. The PDF shows this as a displayed URL on the closing slide.

findings.description: The Venn diagram from PDF page 19 (Project Organization) showing the overlapping responsibilities of HDR, HydroLogics, and NCDWR is missing as an image; its content was converted to bullet-point text only.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 19 has a three-circle Venn diagram. HTML 'Project Organization' section contains only
  • text items with no tag for the diagram.

findings.description: Several alt text values are generic and not sufficiently descriptive of the image content.
findings.evidence: Examples: alt="NC logo" (page 2 NC branding logo with pine tree and 'Nothing Compares / North Carolina' tagline), alt="Dam structure" (page 6 photo of dam/spillway), alt="Fish in stream" (page 6 photo of a spotted trout on rocks). These do not convey meaningful detail.
